stages.name: unit_tests_failing_first
stages.evidence: Before implementation, task-specific tests exposed the audited regressions: doctest --mutate emitted a non-public report shape, explicit --config paths escaped or fell back in doctest/advisory AI paths, absolute --root config reads failed, malformed AI command/runner evidence was accepted, quoted glob metacharacters were parsed contrary to the documented contract, and adapter coverage/gap rows overclaimed behavior.

stages.name: unit_tests
stages.evidence: Full suite passed after implementation (551 tests).

stages.name: task_system_validation_active
stages.evidence: Validator passed with task 125 active after implementation and before completion-state edits.

stages.name: task_system_validation_complete
stages.evidence: Validator passed after moving task 125 to complete with active_task and next_task set to null.

residual_risk: The invalid-candidate distinction is now represented in deterministic helper paths, but current stable doctest mutators do not intentionally emit invalid candidates in ordinary fixtures.
F-045 coverage remains scoped to shared containment and representative adapter-visible symlink/config reads rather than separate symlink fixtures for every guarded CLI path.
AI report parsing now fails closed on missing structured evidence, which can reject older hand-authored malformed fixtures by design.
